description: Personal framework for more accessibility and sustainability, not just for MODX.

scripts.lcss: npm run scss && lightningcss --targets 'defaults' --custom-media --minify public/css/style.src.css -o public/css/style.css && lightningcss --targets 'defaults' --custom-media --minify public/css/print.src.css -o public/css/print.css && lightningcss --targets 'defaults' --custom-media --minify public/css/modx.src.css -o public/css/modx.css
scripts.compile:css: lightningcss --targets 'defaults' --custom-media public/css/style.src.css -o public/css/style.css && lightningcss --targets 'defaults' --custom-media public/css/print.src.css -o public/css/print.css && lightningcss --targets 'defaults' --custom-media public/css/modx.src.css -o public/css/modx.css
scripts.compile: npm run scss && npm run compile:css
scripts.build: npm run lcss && npm run bundle:js
scripts.dev: sass --no-source-map --watch resources/css/style.scss:public/css/style.src.css resources/css/print.scss:public/css/print.src.css resources/css/modx.scss:public/css/modx.src.css & chokidar 'public/css/*.src.css' -c 'npm run compile:css' & esbuild resources/js/bundle.js --bundle --watch --outfile=public/js/script.js & browser-sync start --config bs-config.js

author: Jens Wittmann
name: curlyframework
